Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in joining your organization. Over the past several years
I have had the opportunity to work across a range of projects that have required both careful
independent thinking and close collaboration with others. I have come to value both, and I
believe that combination is what your team is looking for.

My background spans technical work and communication-heavy roles, which means I am
comfortable moving between detailed, focused tasks and broader, more strategic conversations.
I enjoy the kind of work where precision matters, and I take care to get things right before
considering them finished.

What draws me to your organization specifically is the quality of the problems you are
working on. From what I have read and heard, the culture values substance over performance,
and that is an environment where I do my best work. I find that when the people around me
care deeply about what they are building, that energy is contagious in the best possible way.

I would welcome the chance to speak with you further about how my experience might be a good
fit for the role. I am happy to discuss my background in more detail, share examples of past
work, or answer any questions you may have.

Thank you sincerely for taking the time to consider my application. I hope to hear from you.

Sincerely,
A prospective candidate
